name: Microsoft Edge WebView2
description: Embedded Chromium-based web rendering control for Windows native apps — powers Electron-alternative native web UIs.

seo.title: Microsoft Edge WebView2 — No-code / Low-code App Builders
seo.meta_description: Microsoft Edge WebView2: Embedded Chromium-based web rendering control for Windows native apps — powers Electron-alternative native web UIs.

when_to_use: Embedding a web UI inside a Windows desktop application
Chromium-based rendering in a native .NET WinForms app
Lightweight Electron alternative for Windows-only app
In-app browser panel for a desktop productivity tool
WebView-based settings panel inside a C++ application

pros: Chromium engine for native Windows apps
review.verdict: The right answer for Windows-native apps with web UI — if cross-platform isnt a requirement.
review.best_for: Windows-first native app teams wanting web UI without Electron bloat
review.not_for: Teams needing Linux or macOS parity from a single codebase
